summary: Iteration 141: Varianti in PDF + genera-preventivo variant selection - ALL 16 BACKEND TESTS PASS. Tested: (1) _default_varianti() function returns correct A/B/C structure, (2) PDF generation with varianti data (3 variant boxes), (3) PDF legal notes section present, (4) PDF backward compatibility without varianti, (5) PDF 'Da Quotare' for zero cost variants, (6) Variant B 'Consigliato' badge, (7) genera-preventivo endpoint variant selection logic (A/B/C), (8) Zero cost fallback to materials list. Frontend code verified: variant cards UI with data-testids present.

_default_varianti_function.returns_ABC_keys: PASS - Returns dict with A, B, C keys
_default_varianti_function.variant_B_structure: PASS - titolo='Adeguamento Completo', all required fields
_default_varianti_function.variant_C_structure: PASS - titolo='Sostituzione Totale', all required fields

pdf_with_varianti.generates_with_varianti_data: PASS - PDF generates (192KB) with full varianti
pdf_with_varianti.empty_varianti_dict: PASS - PDF generates with empty varianti dict
pdf_with_varianti.variant_b_consigliato: PASS - Variant B has 'Consigliato' badge (via CSS class)

pdf_legal_notes.legal_section_included: PASS - Legal notes section always included in PDF
pdf_legal_notes.en_12453_reference: PASS - References EN 12453:2017 in legal text

pdf_css_classes.legal_section_classes: PASS - legal-section, legal-title, legal-text, legal-highlight defined

genera_preventivo_endpoint.variant_A_selection: PASS - titolo='Adeguamento Minimo', uses costo_stimato from A
genera_preventivo_endpoint.variant_B_selection_default: PASS - titolo='Adeguamento Completo', default when no param
genera_preventivo_endpoint.variant_C_selection: PASS - titolo='Sostituzione Totale', uses costo_stimato from C
genera_preventivo_endpoint.zero_cost_fallback: PASS - When costo_stimato=0, uses materials list + manodopera

critical_code_review_comments: vision_analysis.py _default_varianti() correctly returns A/B/C with all required fields (titolo, descrizione, interventi, costo_stimato, tempo_stimato)
pdf_perizia_sopralluogo.py variants_html (lines 654-711) correctly generates 3 horizontal variant boxes with Consigliato badge on B
pdf_perizia_sopralluogo.py legal_html (lines 714-759) contains Direttiva Macchine references and EN norms
sopralluogo.py genera-preventivo (line 348-351) correctly accepts variante query param with default 'B'
SopralluogoWizardPage.js correctly implements variant selection UI with all data-testids
Frontend passes selectedVariant to endpoint via query param (line 269)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (code structure verified - OAuth required for UI interaction)

test_credentials: Google OAuth required for full UI testing
seed_data_creation: None - all tests use mock data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 141 verifies the new Perizia module features: (1) PDF with 3 variant boxes (PROPOSTE DI INTERVENTO section) and legal notes (NOTE LEGALI E RESPONSABILITA section), (2) genera-preventivo endpoint accepts ?variante=A|B|C with default B, (3) frontend SopralluogoWizardPage.js has variant cards with radio selection and dynamic button text. Key files: vision_analysis.py _default_varianti(), pdf_perizia_sopralluogo.py variants_html/legal_html, sopralluogo.py genera-preventivo, SopralluogoWizardPage.js lines 705-870.
